---
title: "Methodological and Computational Approaches in Data Science"
---

## Course information

**Course:** Methodological and Computational Approaches in Data Science  
**Degree programme:** SERI - Economic Development and International Relations  
**Department:** Department of Political and Social Sciences, University of Pavia  
**Hours:** 20  
**Period:** March-May

## Course overview

This course provides an introduction to methodological and computational approaches in data science, with attention to statistical modelling, machine learning and applied data analysis.

The course is designed to help students understand how data science methods can be used to analyse complex empirical problems in economics, social sciences and international relations.

## Main topics

- Data science workflow
- Statistical learning and machine learning foundations
- Data preprocessing and exploratory analysis
- Model fitting and model assessment
- Interpretation of data-driven results
- Reproducible computational tools

## Course materials

Course materials will be made available during the semester.
